functionDeclarations.name: read_local_attachment_context
functionDeclarations.description: Read local context from a CAS-backed text or code attachment path from this turn or a previous turn in the same chat. Use this for exact or complex questions when summaries are insufficient. Document files are handled via Gemini file attachments.

path.description: Local attachment path exactly as referenced by the user, attachment references, or the chat attachment catalog.

max_chars.description: Maximum characters of context to return. Defaults to 30000 and is capped at 30000.
